LanguageData.NCL_LaserDefenceTurret.label: Laser Point Defense Turret
LanguageData.NCL_LaserDefenceTurret.description: Automated interception platform deployed on colonial frontlines. Generates high-frequency laser beams through sustained power input, effectively neutralizing slow-moving high-trajectory projectiles like mortar shells and incendiary rounds. While demonstrating high accuracy, its single-point defense capability is severely challenged against high-velocity aircraft or saturation attacks - requiring coordinated multi-turret deployment to maintain area denial coverage.
LanguageData.TW_LaserDefenceTurret.label: Mechanoid Laser Point Defense Turret
LanguageData.TW_LaserDefenceTurret.description: Temporary defensive installation deployed by mechanoids in forward areas. Integrated power core enables short-duration high-efficiency operation specialized in intercepting slow enemy projectiles. Upon power depletion, activates self-destruct protocol to prevent capture of core technology.
